name: READING INTERNATIONAL INC
business: Reading International, Inc. operates in theatrical motion picture exhibition and real estate development, ownership, and operation. It owns and operates 58 cinemas in the United States, Australia, and New Zealand, and holds real estate assets including retail, commercial, and live theatre properties.

exposures.sentence: We group our businesses into two operating segments, which are owned and operated through various operating subsidiaries: Theatrical Motion Picture Exhibition (Cinema Exhibition), through as of the date of this 2025 Annual Report, our 58 cinemas.

Real Estate, including real estate development and the rental or licensing of retail, commercial and live theatre assets comprised, as of the date of this 2025 Annual Report, of approximately 9,114,000 square feet of land and approximately 429,000 square feet of net rentable area.

catalysts.event: Sale of Wellington, New Zealand properties
catalysts.sentence: On January 31, 2025, we sold our Wellington, New Zealand properties for $21.5 million (NZ$38.0 million) and entered into an ATL for the cinema component of that upgraded Courtenay Central building.

catalysts.event: Sale of Cannon Park properties in Townsville, Queensland
catalysts.sentence: On May 21, 2025, we sold our Cannon Park properties in Townsville, Queensland for $20.7 million (AU$32.0 million), while retaining the cinema leasehold.

catalysts.event: Closure of Queenstown, New Zealand cinema
catalysts.sentence: On February 9, 2025, we closed one under-performing cinema located in Queenstown, New Zealand upon expiration of that lease.

catalysts.event: Closure of San Diego, California cinema
catalysts.sentence: On April 15, 2025, we closed our underperforming cinema located in San Diego, California, upon termination of that lease.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of remaining 25% interest in Cinemas 1,2,3 property
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we acquired as a part of a larger transaction the 25% interest in that property that we did not previously own.

catalysts.event: Retention of Newmark to monetize Cinemas 1,2,3 property
catalysts.sentence: However, in light of market conditions and our need to pay down debt and enhance our liquidity, in Q1 2026, we have retained Newmark & Company Real Estate, Inc. to monetize that property.
